data.content: Needs changes. The prompt-profile normalization looks correct and targeted doctor tests pass (93/93), but applyFix('prompt-guidance') still replaces only the first managed guidance block because the managed-block regex is non-global and the code performs a single replace. That means files already containing duplicate FOOLERY guidance blocks are not collapsed to one canonical block, which does not satisfy the requested neat/clean fix. Add a duplicate-block regression test and update the fix path to replace the first managed block with the canonical block while removing subsequent duplicates.
